welcome.preview: Hi {name}! Thanks for reaching out. We've received your enquiry and will get back to you shortly. Reply STOP to opt out.

appointment_reminder.preview: Reminder: your appointment is tomorrow at {time}. Reply YES to confirm or RESCHEDULE to change.

re_engagement.preview: Hi {name}! It's been a while — we'd love to help you again. Reply HELLO and we'll be in touch.

consent_request.preview: Please review and sign the form: {link}
